records.title: Gift-card basket group has quantity below one
records.summary: Basket validation rejects it

records.title: Selected gift card has become inactive
records.summary: Basket validation rejects it even if an earlier page loaded it

records.title: Gift-card recipient is missing name/email, or sender name cannot be resolved
records.summary: Basket validation rejects it; seller flows always derive sender from customer name

records.title: Finite denomination inventory is below aggregate quantity reserved in baskets
records.summary: Locked inventory validation rejects the increase as unfulfillable

records.title: Organizer changes denomination value after its first price lock
records.summary: Model save rejects the value change

records.title: Organizer gift-card form has zero denomination rows
records.summary: Current form requires at least one row

records.title: Organizer form sets price below 0.50 or loaded value below price
records.summary: Current form rejects the configuration

records.title: Customer claims nonexistent, inactive, or another user's already-claimed gift-card code, or exceeds redemption throttle
records.summary: User redemption rejects without moving credit ownership; throttle returns 429

records.title: Anonymous buyer purchases where basket disallows guest checkout and no Facebook/Widget exception applies
records.summary: User basket purchase endpoint rejects and requires login

records.title: Logged-out buyer chooses guest for a waitlist basket
records.summary: Current checkout does not expose the guest button for waitlists

records.title: Transfer acceptance proceeds while auth is unresolved or false
records.summary: Dedicated login step registers before the accept step, preventing anonymous claim

records.title: User creates a new account from the desktop box-office login screen
records.summary: Desktop login hides the signup link; provisioning must occur elsewhere

records.title: Anonymous customer claims a gift-card redemption code through the user endpoint
records.summary: User-based redemption requires authenticated user context; code ownership cannot be assigned anonymously

records.title: Draft/non-purchasable membership group or non-public level is initiated from the public detail flow
records.summary: Public serializers/resolution exclude unavailable offers and basket membership cleaning rechecks the selected model; the UI route alone is not authority to sell

evidence.label: Evidence
evidence.value: membership group status/visibility and public serializers

records.title: Membership group supplies a custom expiry while renewals are enabled or frequency is not one-time
records.summary: Venue serializer rejects it; custom expiry is valid only with disabled renewals and one-time frequency

records.title: Lifetime membership has renewals enabled
records.summary: Venue serializer rejects the combination and model cleaning disables renewals/clears expiry

records.title: Organizer changes renewal frequency while inventory-counted active members exist
records.summary: Venue serializer rejects the mutation so existing member expiry semantics cannot be reinterpreted in place

records.title: Renewal seasons are attached to a non-seasonal membership group
records.summary: Venue serializer rejects the nested seasons

records.title: Organizer deletes a season that is the current season for sold memberships
records.summary: Nested group update rejects deletion when current-season members exist

records.title: Season start is not before end, sales start is after season start, sales start is not before sales end, sales end is after season end, or member expiry precedes season end
records.summary: Canonical frontend and backend season validation reject the date set

records.title: Season access windows overlap, or mid-season renewal sale windows overlap
records.summary: Backend rejects overlap; frontend additionally requires each next season/sale window to begin strictly after the prior expiry/end

records.title: Revenue realization is enabled for a non-seasonal group, an ineligible venue/flag state, or disabled after active realized members exist
records.summary: UI hides/gates the toggle and backend rejects unsupported frequency or unsafe disablement

records.title: Membership group with inventory-counted active members, assigned seats, or assigned locations is archived/deleted
records.summary: Model validation rejects archival while owned inventory or seating remains

records.title: Membership level inventory is negative, purchase limit is outside 1–300, public basket exceeds the level limit, or locked inventory cannot satisfy aggregate basket/related-event usage
records.summary: Form/model/basket validation rejects the configuration or request; group sale and active same-level renewal are explicit exceptions to ordinary limit checks

records.title: Membership inventory is raised above an upcoming GA membership-event batch's event inventory
records.summary: Level/group serializers reject the incompatible inventory because generated tickets could not be fulfilled

records.title: One membership benefit is configured for both a membership group and a membership level
records.summary: Benefit cleaning rejects the ambiguous scope; eligible benefits must have one owner and level members inherit the group benefit separately

records.title: One discount is shared by multiple membership benefit definitions
records.summary: Benefit cleaning rejects reuse so use counters and member ownership remain unambiguous

records.title: Assigned-space issue-ticket benefit changes its space after member issue-ticket rows/seats have been assigned
records.summary: Benefit cleaning rejects the change and requires a new benefit

records.title: Membership level price changes after a successfully sent current-season generated-ticket batch locks the level
records.summary: Save-time model validation rejects the edit; an existing generated entitlement cannot be repriced in place

records.title: Donation line omits `charity_id`
records.summary: Basket serializer rejects it; a donation cannot be financially unattributed

records.title: Donation line has no explicit venue and basket has no event ticket from which venue can be derived
records.summary: Basket serializer rejects it; product or membership context alone is not a V1 donation source

records.title: Donation is processed for a venue without valid donation processing/module configuration or through a custom processor
records.summary: Charity processing validation rejects the basket

records.title: Donation charity currency is incompatible with the basket venue/payment currency
records.summary: Venue basket validation rejects the donation purchase

records.title: Buyer starts a standalone donation from the current public frontend
records.summary: No public donation catalog/detail route was found; donation UI renders only after an event item supplies checkout context

records.title: Buyer enters a custom donation above `9999.99` in current public or shared checkout UI
records.summary: Currency input rejects the value before basket mutation

records.title: Buyer retains a zero-value donation item through current donation UI
records.summary: Zero preset/custom value removes an existing donation or declines to create one

records.title: Refund protection quote token is supplied during initial basket creation
records.summary: Basket serializer rejects it; protection can be added only by updating an existing basket

records.title: Buyer opens a sold or expired protection upsell record
records.summary: Details/create service rejects sold records and active-record lookup/service rejects expired offers

records.title: Protection upsell source has no protectable top-level ticket group, any protectable event is too near/past, covered amount is nonpositive/below threshold, or package-child structure is ineligible
records.summary: All-or-nothing eligibility returns no groups, marks the offer expired, and prevents basket creation

records.title: Protection upsell basket request has blank quote token or selected eligible IDs resolve to no currently eligible source groups
records.summary: Request serializer or basket service rejects creation

records.title: Provider quote costs/items do not match the current protected item groups, including after basket repricing
records.summary: Quote consistency validation rejects purchase; switching to Affirm proactively clears the stale token

records.title: Product event or membership permission type is outside allow-all/include/exclude
records.summary: Product API rejects the invalid enum value

records.title: Standalone product widget proceeds with every variant quantity at zero
records.summary: Product step remains invalid and cannot advance; empty selection is not a purchase entry

records.title: Dashboard product variant has negative inventory or price, purchase limit below one, or purchase limit above finite inventory
records.summary: Product form/model validation rejects the configuration

records.title: Ordinary product basket quantity across top-level groups exceeds the variant purchase limit
records.summary: Backend rejects the request; only a persisted group-sale basket bypasses the cap

records.title: Product quantity increase makes aggregate active-basket reservations exceed finite variant inventory
records.summary: Backend locks the variant and rejects the increase; decreases and explicit system-exempt baskets take separate paths

records.title: ResDiary-configured product is purchased at a ResDiary venue without a booking reference
records.summary: Purchase validation rejects the configured product line

records.title: Basket carries a ResDiary booking reference but no phone number
records.summary: Purchase validation rejects it because the external booking cannot be recreated with required customer context

records.title: Add-on basket for an already existing ResDiary booking also contains a ResDiary promotion ticket
records.summary: User basket serializer rejects ticket items in the add-on basket

records.title: Scheduled ticket visibility flip is configured while visibility is already public/public-only or neither hidden nor sellers-only
records.summary: Venue serializer rejects the schedule; model cleaning also clears an inapplicable timestamp

records.title: Scheduled visibility flip is now/past or more than 365 days ahead
records.summary: Venue serializer rejects the timestamp

records.title: Public buyer adds a ticket before `sale_starts_on`, including from a stale/revealed page
records.summary: Backend rejects it; only seller context plus the explicit box-office bypass can enter early

records.title: Buyer or seller adds a ticket after `sale_ends_on`
records.summary: Backend rejects it; the seller bypass applies only to the start boundary

records.title: Online ticket quantity across top-level groups exceeds public purchase limit
records.summary: Basket validation rejects it unless the persisted basket is a group sale

records.title: In-person or on-hold ticket quantity exceeds box-office purchase limit
records.summary: Basket/hold validation rejects it unless the persisted basket is a group sale

records.title: Ticket quantity is below minimum purchase limit
records.summary: Basket validation rejects it except for group sale and the explicit legacy web-box-office assigned-seating bypass

records.title: Public customer's aggregate ticket quantity exceeds `per_user`, using either authenticated account or normalized guest email
records.summary: Locked customer-limit validation rejects the increase or email reassignment

records.title: Selling organization's cumulative delegated ticket sales exceed its allocation
records.summary: Locked venue permission validation rejects the seller basket

records.title: Individual employee's cumulative delegated ticket sales exceed their allocation
records.summary: User permission validation rejects the seller basket

records.title: Ticket increase exceeds legacy/distributed effective inventory, event-wide sibling cap, or current assigned-space supply
records.summary: Sold-out/inventory validation rejects or prunes the unfulfillable mutation; an existing basket may still decrease

evidence.label: Evidence
evidence.value: ticket inventory validation and sold-out service

records.title: PWYC requested price is between zero and the configured minimum, or is zero while free is disabled
records.summary: Item-group validation rejects the requested price

records.title: PWYC configuration contains duplicate suggested values, a forbidden zero, or a positive option below the minimum; or ticket references another venue's configuration
records.summary: Config/model or ticket validation rejects it

records.title: Protected event or ticket receives a blank or nonmatching password
records.summary: Grant service returns `wrong_password`; no scoped permission or ticket reveal is created

records.title: Matching password is inactive, has not started, has ended, or lacks a valid started window
records.summary: Candidate is skipped and access remains unauthorized

records.title: Password configuration enables regex matching but stores an invalid regex
records.summary: Regex error is ignored safely and that candidate cannot grant access

records.title: Public buyer creates a protected-event basket without the matching session grant, or after its 60-minute grant expires
records.summary: Basket creation rechecks event/parent-event access and rejects with `Access Denied`

records.title: Ticket-type grant exists only for a different ticket/parent scope
records.summary: Protected item remains unauthorized; a grant cannot be reused across unrelated ticket types

records.title: Password-authorized baskets collectively exceed `max_item_purchase_limit`
records.summary: Locked aggregate use validation rejects the later basket even though its session grant and ordinary inventory remain valid

records.title: Password-bypass tracking link is used with a ticket from another event
records.summary: Basket validation rejects the linked ticket; the link is not a cross-event credential

records.title: Password-bypass/referral link exceeds its configured event purchase limit
records.summary: Basket creation or purchase recheck rejects the additional quantity

records.title: Basket mixes any voucher-purchase-only ticket group with an ordinary ticket group
records.summary: Backend rejects the entire basket because voucher-only eligibility must be uniform

records.title: Voucher-purchase-only basket has no applicable voucher/discount credit
records.summary: Public controls remain unavailable without an account voucher and backend rejects a crafted basket

records.title: Voucher-purchase-only quantity exceeds the voucher's available credits
records.summary: Backend rejects the basket with required and available credit quantities

records.title: Buyer attempts to enter `presale_code` through the current public frontend or relies on `on_presale` to reveal a ticket
records.summary: No consumer or enforcement path exists in the inspected repositories; these fields cannot currently establish purchase access

records.title: Organizer creates a second package for the same parent ticket type
records.summary: Package serializer rejects it; one parent cannot own two independent package definitions

records.title: Package is created on a parent with prior sales or currently reserved parent seats
records.summary: Serializer rejects creation/update to avoid changing issued entitlements or active reservations

records.title: Preset package has no child ticket type
records.summary: Serializer rejects it because the parent would not define a package outcome

records.title: Package edge uses the same ticket type as parent and child
records.summary: Model/serializer rejects the circular self-edge

records.title: Package parent is already a child bundle while multi-layer packages are disabled, or selected child is itself a bundle under that setting
records.summary: Serializer rejects the graph; nested expansion requires the venue flag

records.title: Custom package option selects a child ticket type that is itself a bundle
records.summary: Basket expansion rejects it because multi-layer custom packages are unsupported

records.title: Custom package submits no selected event, fewer choices than the total required, or more/fewer than a category's exact `required_choice_count` at final validation
records.summary: Basket stays selection-required or validation rejects the mismatch; purchase cannot proceed with an incomplete/overselected package

records.title: Ordinary package maps a GA parent to an assigned-space child, maps parent/child to different assigned spaces, or lacks compatible parent permissions
records.summary: Configuration or basket rebuild rejects the incompatible seating graph

records.title: Both package parent and child use assigned seating but child ratio is not one-to-one
records.summary: Model rejects the relation because one parent seat cannot map deterministically to multiple child seats

records.title: Reverse-ratio package sets `parent_ratio <= 1`, uses `ticket_count != 1`, or targets an assigned-seating child
records.summary: Model rejects the reverse ratio configuration

records.title: Reverse-ratio edge is combined with parent ticket revenue allocation
records.summary: Model rejects it because reverse ratios support only the no-revenue-realization mode

records.title: Package enables both `use_parent_barcode` and `all_items_redeemable`
records.summary: Venue serializer rejects mutually exclusive scan contracts

records.title: Organizer changes `all_items_redeemable` after the package parent has a price lock from sales
records.summary: Model rejects the post-sale scan-contract mutation

records.title: `require_guest_info_for_all_items` is enabled on a multi-layer package
records.summary: Model rejects it because guest-info propagation is not validated across package levels

records.title: Child-based revenue distribution is selected while venue realization is parent-based
records.summary: Serializer/model rejects the incompatible venue/package method

records.title: Paid package uses child revenue distribution but every child ticket is free/non-revenue-bearing
records.summary: Serializer/model rejects it because no child can realize the paid parent revenue

records.title: Package child has a minimum purchase limit
records.summary: Package serializer rejects it; inherited child quantities cannot satisfy an independent minimum contract safely

records.title: Bundled product entitlement has no in-stock variant whose purchase limit can cover required quantity
records.summary: Basket expansion rejects with insufficient bundled-product inventory

records.title: Basket reaches purchase while a bundled-product child still has `preset_attribute_applied`
records.summary: Purchase validation rejects until every generated product entitlement has a final variant selection

records.title: Organizer adds, changes, or deletes bundled-product configuration after the parent ticket price is locked by sales
records.summary: `SubProductInfo` save/delete rejects the mutation

records.title: Non-all-items-redeemable template package points outside its template event, or a non-template parent includes a template child
records.summary: Serializer rejects the graph because generated event cloning cannot map it consistently

records.title: Non-ticket/non-membership item group submits seat or location permissions
records.summary: Basket rejects the item type as invalid for assigned seating

records.title: Ticket group supplies seat permissions for an event with no assigned space
records.summary: Basket rejects the selection; a seat ID cannot convert a GA event into assigned seating

records.title: Ordinary assigned-space ticket group supplies neither a seat nor GA location outside the waitlist path
records.summary: Basket rejects it instead of issuing an unassigned ticket

records.title: Concrete selected-seat count differs from ordinary ticket group quantity
records.summary: Basket rejects the incomplete/extra assignment

records.title: Basket repeats a seat permission ID or requests two permissions that resolve to the same event/benefit seat
records.summary: Duplicate permission/seat validation rejects the request

records.title: Seat or location permission does not match the selected ticket type/membership level, is invalid, or belongs to a different assigned-space context
records.summary: Basket rejects the mismatched permission before usage creation

records.title: Requested concrete permission is already claimed, held, reserved, sold, or blocked by a related shared/package permission
records.summary: Availability validation rejects the reservation; stale map state cannot oversell the seat

records.title: Ordinary ticket group supplies more than one GA location permission
records.summary: Basket rejects it; only multi-benefit memberships can carry multiple locations

records.title: Location or ticket-type location-permission usage exceeds physical/event/benefit capacity or its configured cap
records.summary: Locked capacity validation rejects the increase

records.title: Buyer selects only part of a concrete-seat location marked `full_purchase_required`
records.summary: Basket rejects with selected-versus-total seat counts

records.title: Best-available request supplies none or more than one of event, membership benefit, and package
records.summary: Input serializer rejects the ambiguous/missing scope

records.title: Best-available request quantity exceeds 50
records.summary: Input field validation rejects it before search/scoring

records.title: Best-available fixed ticket-type quantity is below its minimum or above the public/box-office purchase limit
records.summary: Input serializer rejects the type quantity

records.title: Best-available fixed membership-level quantity exceeds the level purchase limit
records.summary: Input serializer rejects it

records.title: Best-available search cannot produce a valid consecutive/filter-compatible result before timeout
records.summary: Endpoint returns a recoverable 408 and no basket reservation is created

records.title: Dynamic-hold URL slug does not resolve to a basket with dynamic hold details
records.summary: Hold validator returns 404; public hold page shows an unusable-link state

records.title: Dynamic-hold child selects an unrelated item/permission or child usages exceed the held parent quantity
records.summary: Validator rejects the item or overdraw; child cannot escape the held inventory boundary

records.title: Organizer deletes/changes a location permission already sold, reserved, used by membership issuance, or referenced by a waitlist basket
records.summary: Permission service/model rejects the mutation and recursively protects recurring children

records.title: Event is configured as both recurring and an attraction parent
records.summary: Model/config validation rejects the combination

records.title: `attraction_event_config` is not a list
records.summary: Config serializer/model rejects malformed JSON shape

records.title: Attraction entry uses an unknown type, omits a required field, or supplies a required field with the wrong primitive type
records.summary: Config serializer rejects the entry before saving hierarchy relations

records.title: Two attraction sections use the same `sort_order`
records.summary: Config serializer rejects the ambiguous ordering

records.title: Attraction event/product/membership/ticket IDs are missing or belong to another venue
records.summary: Config serializer rejects the IDs; attraction hubs cannot aggregate another venue's catalog

records.title: Attraction EVENT section includes the attraction itself or another attraction parent
records.summary: Config serializer rejects nested/self attraction containers

records.title: Buyer attempts to purchase the attraction container event rather than a configured concrete child/ticket occurrence
records.summary: Basket validation rejects the container; hierarchy selection must resolve a sellable child

records.title: Legacy mobile discovery expects to open an attraction parent with no attraction-page support
records.summary: Event queryset hides attraction parents for that client behavior; the entry is intentionally unreachable

records.title: Basket reaches purchase while status is `selection_required`
records.summary: Purchase validation rejects unresolved seat/package/product selection; client must complete selection and return the basket to pending

records.title: Client mutates a `purchase_in_progress` basket while provider outcome is unresolved
records.summary: Item-status edit validation rejects the update so payment confirmation cannot race a cart mutation

records.title: Client submits purchase again while basket is already `purchase_in_progress`
records.summary: Purchase validation rejects the duplicate initiation; reset/reconcile/provider callback must resolve the first attempt

records.title: Client mutates or repurchases a `payed` basket
records.summary: Edit validation and the purchase-service `invoice_id` guard reject it; a second invoice cannot reuse the basket

records.title: Basket is saved as `payed` without an invoice
records.summary: Model save raises because every paid basket requires an invoice relation

records.title: Client mutates or purchases an `expired` basket
records.summary: Status validation rejects the terminal basket; frontend clears it and requires a newly created/reconstructed basket

records.title: Automatic expiry worker attempts to expire an `on_hold` or `waitlisted` basket through the ordinary pending-basket queryset
records.summary: Those statuses are excluded; hold release and subscriber lifecycle own their terminal transitions

records.title: Expiry races an active/persisted pending or completed Square terminal checkout
records.summary: `expire()` returns false and preserves the basket for provider reconciliation rather than releasing paid-or-uncertain inventory

records.title: Seller puts an expired, paid, waitlisted, selection-required, or purchase-in-progress basket on hold
records.summary: `try_hold()` returns false; only pending or already-held baskets can enter/reapply hold state

records.title: Seller supplies a malformed or past `hold_expiry_date`
records.summary: Hold expiry normalization rejects the value; a held basket cannot start already expired

records.title: Caller releases a basket that is not currently on hold, or issues two concurrent releases
records.summary: Status/row-lock validation rejects the release; task returns a failure instead of double-decrementing held inventory

records.title: Basket update uses a stale `checkout_idempotency_key`
records.summary: Locked update returns the basket concurrency error and does not apply the stale mutation

records.title: Two basket updates cannot acquire the row lock concurrently
records.summary: Losing request receives a recoverable concurrency response; it cannot overwrite the winner's quantity or checkout key

records.title: Frontend rehydrates a paid, expired, refunded, voided, transferred, resold, used, fraud, or waitlisted basket as an active cart
records.summary: `isBasketStatusValid()` returns false and the global observer clears every alias for that basket provider

records.title: Expired basket has no email, contains a zero-subtotal group, is a hold, or originated from an abandoned-cart tracking link
records.summary: Abandoned-cart validation creates no recovery recipient, preventing unusable, free, held, or recursive recovery

records.title: Venue disabled abandoned-cart email, account/guest lacks permission, or basket events are ineligible
records.summary: Recovery validation creates/sends no recipient even though the basket is expired

records.title: A newer unsent cart overlaps the same buyer/events, or the buyer later purchases the event
records.summary: Older recipient is unscheduled/marked unrecoverable or cleaned after purchase; stale recovery must not remain current

records.title: Stripe failure/cancel callback blindly leaves an ordinary basket in purchase-in-progress
records.summary: Failure handler restores a retryable `pending` state, or `on_hold` only for an eligible metadata-backed hold under the replacement switch

records.title: Provider success is treated as proof of a completed Showpass order when basket has no invoice
records.summary: Client must continue webhook/finalization/invoice polling or enter operational reconciliation; confirmation cannot rely on provider status alone

evidence.label: Evidence
evidence.value: purchase-service post-payment invariant; payment gateway polling

records.title: `info_required` standard-info group omits first name, last name, or email
records.summary: Purchase validation rejects insufficient standard guest info; phone is collected by standard mode but is not part of its backend `all()` requirement

records.title: Enhanced-info group omits an organizer-enabled field, or home address omits city/country
records.summary: Purchase validation rejects the incomplete attendee information

records.title: Venue-based checkout is expected to enforce attendee collection while `enforce_box_office_info_collection=false`
records.summary: This enforcement expectation is unreachable by design; venue-based guest validation returns without requiring the configured fields

records.title: Parent package group, Facebook order, Stripe wallet, Yuno webhook, group sale, auto-generated/ignored-data flow, or Square kiosk is expected to follow ordinary guest-info validation
records.summary: `TicketItemGroup.validate_guest_info()` bypasses the ordinary path; correctness must be asserted through the flow-specific inherited/external data contract instead

records.title: Submitted required dynamic answer in an enforced event response is blank, null, or invalid for its input type
records.summary: Dynamic-form validators reject the response before purchase

records.title: Test assumes every configured required custom question is always backend-enforced
records.summary: Not a valid invariant: validation currently requires an enforced event group and a submitted response payload, and an empty optional field causes the validator to return before later fields

records.title: Ordinary event or membership group requires terms but `accepted_terms` is false/missing
records.summary: Purchase rejects until that item group's terms are accepted

records.title: Facebook, Square kiosk, or another `ignore_purchase_data_validation()` context is expected to show or enforce ordinary terms acceptance
records.summary: The ordinary validator bypasses it; tests must use the context's own acceptance/data contract

records.title: Consent response payload is an array, scalar, or other non-object value
records.summary: Basket consent normalization rejects it; responses must be keyed by consent item ID

records.title: Consent response ID is malformed, unknown, or belongs to another payment venue
records.summary: Normalization rejects the submitted ID; a basket cannot answer another venue's consent item

records.title: Clickwrap consent submits a non-boolean selected value
records.summary: Consent normalization rejects it

records.title: Required clickwrap consent is false or unresolved at purchase
records.summary: Purchase-time materialization rejects until the item is accepted

records.title: Browserwrap consent submits a non-null selected value or is treated as a required checkbox
records.summary: Service/model validation rejects the selected value/configuration; browserwrap is disclosure accepted by purchase and cannot be required

records.title: Basket submits consent responses without a payment venue
records.summary: Consent normalization rejects the payload because consent ownership cannot be established

records.title: Item group selects a shipping type absent from its authoritative option set
records.summary: Basket validation rejects the unavailable method rather than trusting the client

records.title: Purchase contains a selected delivery group but neither a usable shipping address nor an accepted billing-address fallback
records.summary: Purchase rejects the missing delivery address

records.title: Delivery address country cannot be resolved, is outside the venue allowlist, or resolves to a blocked subdivision
records.summary: Destination validation rejects the address; no invoice is created

records.title: Shipping cap is exceeded and a delivery-capable group has no print/will-call fallback
records.summary: Basket update/purchase rejects with the missing-fallback message

records.title: Shipping cap is exceeded and currently selected delivery artifact count is above the limit
records.summary: Basket update/purchase rejects the selected delivery method with the venue/default cap message

records.title: Cap-exceeded basket with a non-delivery fallback proceeds while affected groups still have unresolved shipping selection
records.summary: Basket remains `selection_required`; review/purchase is blocked until each affected group chooses an allowed fallback

records.title: Mixed-method group proceeds to payment with no persisted shipping type
records.summary: Frontend review blocks it and backend selection state remains unresolved; omission cannot silently choose delivery

records.title: Regular/non-third-party venue configures customer-activated barcode delivery
records.summary: Venue, event, or ticket-type model validation rejects it; customer activation is restricted to third-party venues

records.title: Delayed-delivery purchase made after the configured activation threshold is expected to remain hidden
records.summary: Ticket initialization activates it immediately because the event starts inside the delay window

records.title: Account activation request contains no user-owned ticket IDs
records.summary: Activation serializer rejects with no tickets to activate

records.title: Account activation request includes an already-active owned ticket or owned tickets from different baskets
records.summary: Activation serializer rejects the entire request; one email/activation operation cannot span baskets or reactivate a code

records.title: Test assumes backend activation enforces every frontend eligibility guard
records.summary: Not a valid invariant: the UI requires future paid customer-activation tickets, while the backend currently validates only user ownership, inactivity, and one basket; non-owned IDs are filtered rather than compared against the full request

evidence.label: Evidence
evidence.value: account activation availability utility; user activation serializer/viewset

records.title: Imported external barcode contains an invalid barcode string
records.summary: ExternalBarcode model validation rejects the code

records.title: External barcode expiration is earlier than its event end
records.summary: Model validation rejects it; the provider code cannot expire before the ticket's event completes

records.title: ExternalBarcode is attached to a ticket type with `use_external_barcode=false`
records.summary: Model validation rejects the relation

records.title: External-barcode ticket reaches generation after all codes are already used
records.summary: Locked allocation raises instead of silently generating a Showpass fallback code; sold-out/inventory checks should normally prevent this path

records.title: Ticket configured with `send_universal_code` enters ordinary ticket-transfer creation
records.summary: Transfer validation rejects the ticket type; the account-level credential cannot be transferred as an ordinary unique ticket barcode

evidence.label: Evidence
evidence.value: user transfer serializer tests; ticket transfer contract

records.title: Seller changes an item whose fulfillment status is `shipping_not_applicable` into a shipping status
records.summary: Fulfillment serializer rejects converting a non-shipping artifact into shipping work

records.title: Convert-to-electronic request runs with feature disabled, no same-venue non-electronic groups, or no paid/used items
records.summary: Endpoint rejects; it cannot mutate unrelated venues, already-electronic groups, or terminal/inactive artifacts

records.title: Public purchaser name is blank, one token, or contains unsupported characters; email or phone is invalid
records.summary: Purchaser section remains incomplete and opens/keeps the edit form; checkout cannot rely on a looser login/signup prefill

records.title: Direct public system-card purchase reaches local card cleanup with no billing address and no provider/automatic-guest exception
records.summary: Purchase service rejects `billing_address` as required before finalization

records.title: Required manual billing address is present but omits a common postal-address field
records.summary: Purchase validation rejects the missing field; a partial object does not satisfy direct-card billing

records.title: Switch-gated blocked-billing-country validation receives an unresolvable country or a country configured as blocked by the payment venue
records.summary: Purchase rejects before invoice/payment side effects; when the switch, venue, address, or blocked list is absent, this specific restriction does not run

records.title: Free or waitlist checkout is expected to require a billing address merely because the checkout contains a payment section
records.summary: Those branches are immediately billing-valid; delivery address requirements remain independent

records.title: Selecting a saved card then using manual or same-as-shipping state to overwrite its stored billing address
records.summary: Billing-source builder uses the selected card's address, including explicit null, and ignores the manual form for that source

records.title: Issued TicketItem is expected to remain nameless when attendee info is absent
records.summary: Name-on-ticket save derives group/basket purchaser fallback; blank input does not intentionally erase the issued name

records.title: Account owner edits ticket name while organizer setting is disabled or ticket status is not paid
records.summary: User ticket endpoint returns method-not-allowed; UI should not expose the action

records.title: Test assumes the backend name-edit endpoint enforces every account UI guard
records.summary: Not a valid invariant: UI additionally blocks inactive, virtual-stream, transfer/resale-in-progress, transfer-created, transfer-disabled-status, and past-event tickets, while the server update guard checks only venue setting and paid status

evidence.label: Evidence
evidence.value: account edit-name utility; user ticket viewset

records.title: Seller bulk-name request includes IDs outside the active venue or outside the viewset queryset
records.summary: Scoped queryset does not update those records; response includes only matched active-venue items/groups

records.title: Name edit exceeds 128 characters, seller edit is blank, or user blank edit is expected to erase the name
records.summary: Length/required validation rejects typed invalid values; a user blank value reaches model save and is replaced by the default name rather than erasing it

evidence.label: Evidence
evidence.value: TicketItem model field/serializer; venue name-change serializers; `NameOnTicket._set_name_on_ticket()`

records.title: Basket quantity increase exceeds the current minimum authoritative inventory source after another reservation wins
records.summary: Locked basket validation rejects the increase; stale displayed inventory cannot oversell legacy/distributed/seat/location supply

records.title: Existing basket is expected to reject a quantity decrease merely because the ticket type is now globally sold out
records.summary: Decrease/removal remains valid and releases the owned delta; sold-out validation governs new/increased demand

records.title: Expiry, hold release, waitlist rollback, or resale cancellation releases the same inventory/permission twice
records.summary: Status checks and row locks make the second terminal transition a no-op/error rather than increasing capacity again

records.title: Waitlist processing runs for an unlinked/inactive waitlist or after its event cutoff
records.summary: Validator rejects before subscriber allocation

records.title: Yuno payment venue enables waitlist credit-card verification
records.summary: Waitlist model validation rejects the configuration because deferred verification is Stripe SetupIntent-specific

records.title: Waitlist group quantity exceeds its configured ticket purchase limit or subscriber quantity falls outside 1..3000
records.summary: Basket/model validation rejects the join

records.title: Worker processes a subscriber not in scheduled status or whose basket is no longer waitlisted
records.summary: Subscriber validation rejects; a cancelled/held/completed entry cannot be allocated as pending queue demand

records.title: Inventory scheduling starts while the ticket type still has scheduled subscribers from a previous run
records.summary: Validator rejects to prevent allocating the same inventory batch twice

records.title: Scheduled subscriber quantity exceeds available legacy inventory, or distributed reservation cannot be verified/re-established
records.summary: Fulfillment rejects and its failure handler restores inventory/subscriber state

records.title: Subscriber must be held but waitlist cutoff leaves fewer than the fixed 24 hold hours before the event
records.summary: Hold creation rejects and alerts operations rather than creating an already-invalid opportunity

records.title: User cancels subscriber after it has become scheduled, in progress, held, completed, or already cancelled
records.summary: Cancel service/status recheck rejects; only pending subscriber cancellation expires the waitlist basket

records.title: Frontend creates a waitlist payment handler with a gateway other than Stripe or Showpass
records.summary: Handler construction fails with a payment configuration error

records.title: Waitlist checkout treats setup/deferred confirmation as success but basket never reaches waitlisted or no subscriber becomes queryable
records.summary: Frontend polling fails explicitly; it cannot show an invoice-style success for an unconfirmed join

records.title: Resale submission includes an unowned, unpaid, inactive, ended, resale-disabled, transfer-in-progress, or already-resale ticket
records.summary: Backend compares the complete requested set against eligible owned tickets and rejects the submission

records.title: One resale submission mixes ticket types or tickets from different invoices
records.summary: Serializer rejects; each submission has one ticket-type and one original-invoice financial contract

records.title: Resale source invoice is not a sale/payment-plan invoice or used any amount of account/venue credit
records.summary: Serializer rejects; the original refund basis is unsupported/ambiguous

records.title: Resale selection spans multiple seat segments, multiple standing locations, or mixes concrete seating and standing inventory
records.summary: Assigned-seating validation requires separate submissions per scope

records.title: Ticket has an issued protection policy with submitted or approved claim when resale is requested
records.summary: Resale validation rejects the conflicting value-recovery path

records.title: Public assigned-seat/location resale basket requests only part of a submission or a mismatched permission
records.summary: Matcher rejects; seated/location resale cannot fall back to combination splitting or ordinary capacity

records.title: Public resale group with seat/location permissions bypasses unmatched listings using apparent regular inventory
records.summary: Non-resale fallback returns false for permission-based groups, preventing listed capacity from being double-counted

records.title: User cancels a resale submission that is system-origin, in progress, completed, refund-failed, or otherwise non-pending
records.summary: Cancel serializer/service rejects; matched or system lifecycle state cannot be unwound by the pending-user action

records.title: Same TicketItem enters a second non-cancelled resale submission
records.summary: Conditional uniqueness rejects the duplicate active listing

records.title: Resale completion/refund runs from an ineligible submission status or finds no matching in-progress tickets for the buyer basket
records.summary: Refund service rejects instead of changing seller/buyer state without a matched artifact

records.title: User assigns another user's payout preference or edits banking details in a disallowed resale status
records.summary: Serializer queryset/status validation rejects

records.title: Original seller refund fails and automation rolls back the already-paid resale buyer's entitlement
records.summary: This is not the contract: buyer remains paid, seller submission becomes refund-failed/bank-reconciliation state, and payout follow-up owns resolution

records.title: Discount code is unknown, inactive/non-public, deleted, outside its date window, or belongs to another venue
records.summary: Basket update rejects the code and retains no newly discounted payable state

records.title: Discount is valid globally but not allowed for this public/box-office checkout or not permitted on any selected item group
records.summary: Basket validation rejects rather than reducing an ineligible line

records.title: Discount exceeds global, basket, per-user, per-event, member-benefit, voucher, or current quantity/rule availability
records.summary: Locked basket validation rejects or limits the applicable units; stale client availability cannot over-consume uses

evidence.label: Evidence
evidence.value: discount limit validation and usage locks

records.title: Test expects a flat/percentage discount larger than eligible item value to make subtotal or total negative
records.summary: Calculator caps the reduction at eligible subtotal/line value; payable money does not become negative

records.title: Apply-once allocation or a per-line discount pushes a line below the absorbed configurable-fee floor
records.summary: Proportional/cap pass clamps and redistributes the reduction; a remaining unsafe organizer-fee configuration raises before purchase

records.title: Partial itemized apply-to-each normalization recombines rows whose guest, package, membership, or assigned-seat identity would be lost
records.summary: Service leaves unsafe rows separate; financial compactness cannot erase fulfillment/attendee identity

records.title: Selected item/tender/platform has no supported fee structure or an unmergeable fee-calculation result
records.summary: Financial calculation raises before provider confirmation instead of guessing a rate card/total

records.title: `Other` tender reaches fee calculation without an `other_payment_type_id`
records.summary: Fee calculation/purchase validation rejects because its custom rate/subtype cannot be resolved

evidence.label: Evidence
evidence.value: configured/itemized fee calculation assertion; payment validation

records.title: Package absorbed flat child fees exceed the package parent subtotal
records.summary: Package financial validation rejects with fee-total-versus-price error; child absorption cannot create a negative parent value

records.title: Facebook/Google marketplace order includes shipping or a discount while using the special marketplace calculation branch
records.summary: Backend assertions reject; the branch requires zero shipping and unchanged subtotal, then reconciles platform price disparity explicitly

records.title: Package parent and child are each expected to retain an independent shipping charge for the same fulfillment boundary
records.summary: Shipping cleanup de-duplicates parent/child charges; only the authoritative group/override contributes

records.title: `tax_shipping=false` or venue-specific no-shipping-tax context is expected to remove item/fee tax as well
records.summary: Only the shipping-tax component is excluded; other taxable item and fee components remain

records.title: Compatible mixed regular/itemized basket is merged by string/float concatenation or one side overwrites the other
records.summary: Merger accepts matching Decimal/list/bool fields and sums/concatenates/ORs them; incompatible types raise a customer-visible calculation error

records.title: Credit amount is zero/negative, has no supported credit type, or is applied to no purchased item groups
records.summary: Client does not submit a zero toggle; backend validation/allocation produces no usable application or rejects the invalid credit context

records.title: Requested user/venue/gift/exchange credit exceeds its locked available balance
records.summary: Backend rejects insufficient credit or caps only where the credit-family contract explicitly allows capping; client balance is not authoritative

records.title: Anonymous public buyer applies ordinary account, venue, or claimed gift-card credit without the explicit seller/code-only/exchange exception
records.summary: Credit ownership validation rejects or the frontend exposes no account balance; anonymous stored value is not inferred from an email

records.title: Public checkout combines exchange + gift card + venue + universal monetary credit in one basket
records.summary: Current client path is unreachable: one `credit_type`/`credit_applied` pair is selected with exchange > gift > venue > universal priority

records.title: Gift-card code is nonexistent, inactive, already claimed by another user, throttled, or not applicable to the basket venue/currency
records.summary: Claim/application rejects without transferring or spending value; prior basket total remains authoritative

records.title: Exchange credit is applied to a zero cart, without a source transaction where required, or against a different venue
records.summary: Exchange validation rejects before allocation or settlement

records.title: Lower-value exchange proceeds while overflow is disabled, or anonymous overflow proceeds when the account/surplus exception is unavailable
records.summary: Exchange validation rejects; excess value cannot disappear through an unsupported path

records.title: Basket retains a full-credit payment type after credit removal or after recalculation leaves a positive remainder
records.summary: Payment validation resets/rejects stale full-credit state and requires a normal tender for the remaining amount

records.title: Client/provider amount is reused after quantity, discount, delivery, credit, payment type, or seller-context mutation
records.summary: Payment manager/backend must modify or replace the incompatible payment object/session; purchase total assertions reject a stale amount

records.title: Subtotal override is zero/negative, exceeds the current subtotal, lacks seller permission/feature or group-sale exception, or is injected/changed by a public user
records.summary: Serializer rejects or ignores the unauthorized value; a buyer cannot use the override field as a free-price exploit

records.title: Authorize.Net checkout initializes without a basket gateway, API login ID, or publishable client key
records.summary: Frontend throws a configuration error before card tokenization or purchase

records.title: Authorize.Net confirmation runs before Accept.js finishes loading or after its load failed
records.summary: It awaits the shared in-flight load; a failed/unavailable instance becomes a typed initialization error and remains retryable after reinitialization

records.title: Authorize.Net form is missing card number, expiry, or CVC element, or token response contains no nonce
records.summary: Frontend rejects before backend purchase with a field/tokenization processing error

records.title: Accept.js terminal user-input, credential, or unknown error is retried as if it were transient
records.summary: Classifier bypasses automatic retry; only `E_WC_14`/empty-message transient results consume the bounded retry budget

records.title: Two Authorize.Net confirm calls mint separate nonces while one confirmation is already in flight
records.summary: Gateway returns the active confirmation promise; backend/provider duplicate-window behavior is defense in depth, not the primary double-click path

records.title: Authorize.Net response is null, has transaction errors, invalid merchant credentials, or a zero/test-mode transaction ID
records.summary: Backend rejects with payment/authentication error and creates no paid Showpass invoice

records.title: Square terminal checkout is treated as paid while status remains pending/in-progress
records.summary: Poll/purchase validation rejects as still in progress; basket/inventory remain held for later provider completion

records.title: Completed Square terminal checkout has zero or multiple payment IDs
records.summary: Backend alerts and rejects rather than choosing one or creating an ambiguous invoice; manual refund/reconciliation is required

records.title: Duplicate Square final webhook purchases an already-final terminal basket again
records.summary: Row lock plus final-status and invoice guards make the replay an idempotent exit

records.title: Square terminal request/poll/payment-detail API fails or terminal access is missing
records.summary: Purchase raises a validation error and alerts; no invoice is fabricated from incomplete terminal data

records.title: Shift4 task runs without valid device/seller basket context or provider returns network/non-2xx error
records.summary: Provider exception path marks terminal canceled and basket pending; seller must correct context/retry

records.title: Shift4 provider success followed by local purchase failure is handled by resending the device sale automatically
records.summary: Handler propagates local validation failure after storing completed evidence; it requires reconciliation, not an automatic second charge

records.title: Yuno success webhook has missing/invalid/multiple merchant-order basket mapping
records.summary: Retriever returns no basket and alerts/logs; it cannot attach payment to an arbitrary order

records.title: Yuno `DECLINED`, `PENDING`, `MANUALLY_REVIEW`, `EXPIRED`, `ERROR`, or unknown purchase status generates an invoice
records.summary: Purchase webhook only logs these branches; only `SUCCEEDED` enters local purchase finalization

records.title: Repeated Yuno cancel expires/releases an already-expired basket again
records.summary: Cancel handler exits when basket is already expired; failure handler/reset and expiry run once

records.title: Yuno provider success followed by local validation failure is swallowed without durable operational evidence
records.summary: Handler increments metrics, logs, and creates a critical webhook-failure ErrorLog; configured processing may re-raise

records.title: Any provider success, terminal completion, or webhook status is accepted as customer confirmation while the basket lacks an invoice
records.summary: Confirmation remains incomplete and enters polling/reconciliation; only local paid basket + invoice proves Showpass completion

records.title: Guest claim targets a basket without an invoice, an already-owned order, or a signed-in account whose email does not match the guest purchase
records.summary: Claim rejects before migration; ownership and all linked artifacts remain unchanged

records.title: Resend, download, or wallet generation is treated as a new purchase or resets ticket scan/activation state
records.summary: Artifact operation reuses the existing invoice/item and creates no new sale, entitlement, or usage allowance

evidence.label: Evidence
evidence.value: confirmation/PDF/wallet task and account action families

records.title: Inactive, non-redeemable, unpaid, refunded, voided, resold, wrong-event/time, or exhausted credential is accepted by scanning
records.summary: Scanner validation rejects and records no new admission usage

records.title: Package parent and children are all independently scannable when `use_parent_barcode` owns redemption, or parent is accepted when only children are redeemable
records.summary: Package credential configuration selects one admission scope and prevents duplicate admission

records.title: Transfer is created for an unowned, unpaid/inactive, non-transferable, over-limit, resale-conflicted, already-transfer-pending, or protected-claim item
records.summary: Transfer serializer rejects; ownership and credential remain with the current valid owner

records.title: Transfer acceptance, cancellation, or return replays after the transfer reached an incompatible terminal state
records.summary: State validation rejects/no-ops; it cannot duplicate ownership or reconstruct a voided/resold entitlement

records.title: Name edit is used as proof of transfer or changes purchaser/invoice ownership
records.summary: Only the permitted display name changes; ownership requires the transfer/claim lifecycle

records.title: Exchange uses another user's/source venue's credit, reuses a consumed source, or proceeds without source-invoice linkage
records.summary: Exchange credit validation rejects and no replacement basket can consume the value

records.title: UpgradePath has both/neither source kinds, both/neither target kinds, same-family source equals target, foreign-venue/archived item, cancelled ticket event, or a disabled required venue module
records.summary: Organizer serializer rejects the path before it can be published

records.title: Refund request selects an invoice item, ticket, member, or renewal member that does not belong to the invoice
records.summary: Serializer rejects the foreign ID before refunder execution

records.title: Partial refund omits an invoice item, selects multiple invoice items, combines `refund_all`, or selects a ticket/member outside the one item
records.summary: Serializer rejects; partial scope remains exactly one invoice item

records.title: Partial refund exceeds `amount_earned_stat - amount_refunded_stat` or exceeds ticket face value after absorbed non-tax fees
records.summary: Serializer rejects the amount and preserves prior refund statistics

records.title: Full refund on a credit-applied/exchange-credit invoice uses a partial or unsupported fee-only variant
records.summary: Only supported full variants proceed; unsupported type is rejected

records.title: Refund reverses an unsupported/unavailable gateway, cash without permission, or a payment type outside venue refund policy
records.summary: Permission/payment/gateway validation rejects before external reversal

evidence.label: Evidence
evidence.value: refund serializer and gateway capability helpers

records.title: Full customer refund proceeds while a covered protection claim has consumed or submitted value
records.summary: Refund/claim guard rejects; policy workflow must resolve first

records.title: Refund includes a paid-out invoice item where the venue disallows refunds after payout
records.summary: Serializer rejects based on `payout_invoice_item_id`; settlement is not silently rewritten

records.title: External-supplier refund has missing booking metadata, multiple integration partners, or a non-refundable external booking
records.summary: Integration validation rejects before local item/provider mutation

records.title: ResDiary partial refund or partial void cancels only selected tickets from an all-or-nothing booking
records.summary: Serializer rejects; booking-level cancellation remains full-scope

records.title: Code-only gift-card/card refund runs without rollout, uses a non-partial type, or exceeds remaining card-paid value
records.summary: Serializer rejects; when enabled it caps the operation to remaining CC value

records.title: Square async refund initiation immediately marks the customer refunded before provider completion
records.summary: Invoice/items remain `refund_in_progress`; callback success creates final refund state

records.title: Square refund cancel/failure/reset leaves stale request or in-progress flags that block all later legitimate actions
records.summary: Revert clears request and flags and restores non-final items; already-refunded items stay final

records.title: Refund-to-credit both reverses the original gateway and generates spendable credit for the same value
records.summary: Credit path creates the linked UserCredit outcome instead of a duplicate tender reversal

records.title: Void type and selection disagree, selected IDs are foreign/non-voidable, or caller lacks venue permission
records.summary: Void serializer rejects before invoice lock/side effects

records.title: Void proceeds while protection policy is not issued or has a submitted claim
records.summary: Voider rejects before sold items change state

records.title: Replayed void recreates void rows, re-voids ticket credits, or schedules duplicate inventory recovery for already-voided items
records.summary: Locked/status-aware void path skips terminal items and refreshes each affected ticket type once

records.title: Renewal runs for lifetime/one-time, paused, terminal, out-of-window, wrong-season, or already-scheduled rollover member
records.summary: Renewal eligibility rejects/no-ops; no duplicate member purchase or benefits fanout occurs

records.title: Payment-plan retry or refresh creates duplicate installment invoices or retains schedule amounts from obsolete basket/rate-card math
records.summary: Subscription/installment identity and refresh task preserve one current schedule and one invoice per successful due event

records.title: Fulfillment updates a foreign item, terminal refunded/voided item, already-completed work, or rolls invoice to fulfilled while eligible children remain open
records.summary: Scoped state validation rejects or retains partial status; roll-up derives from all applicable items

records.title: Duplicate/missing-charge dispute webhook creates a second dispute invoice/fee or attaches to an arbitrary invoice
records.summary: Invoice lock/source mapping makes duplicate delivery idempotent and missing mapping operationally visible

evidence.label: Evidence
evidence.value: dispute lock, financial manager, invoice dispute methods

records.title: Settlement selector includes an already-settled row, ignores a refund/void/dispute/exchange correction, or calculates from obsolete base values
records.summary: Selector uses unsettled eligibility and current `*_stat`; source rows link to one payout invoice item

records.title: A source TicketType or MembershipLevel is configured with multiple simultaneous upgrade targets
records.summary: Conditional unique constraint permits only one UpgradePath per source; the UI array is compatibility shape, not proof of multi-choice support

records.title: Sold-out ticket or membership target remains a public upgrade option
records.summary: Public serializer excludes it, so no offer is created from current data

records.title: Public ticket list is assumed to always include upgrade option payloads
records.summary: List endpoint can suppress options unless explicitly requested; detail serialization includes them

records.title: Concrete seated/location basket group, seated source ticket type, or seated target ticket is offered by current web cart
records.summary: `BasketUpgradesService` suppresses the offer; target cannot bypass seat selection through a one-click replacement

records.title: Membership assigned-seating upgrade is claimed fully eligible or fully blocked by current frontend
records.summary: Not a proven invariant: assigned-seating membership filtering is an explicit TODO because required permission data is unavailable to the service

records.title: Product variant upgrade is treated as a supported current offer
records.summary: Frontend returns no product options and marks product upgrade implementation TODO; backend UpgradePath has no product fields

records.title: Membership-to-ticket path is assumed publicly reachable because the backend model accepts cross-kind paths
records.summary: Current public MembershipLevel serializer/frontend service exposes only membership targets; classify membership-to-ticket as organizer-configurable but current public-cart unreachable

records.title: Upgrade acceptance charges only the displayed positive price difference or creates exchange credit
records.summary: Frontend delta is presentation data; mutation removes the unpaid source and adds the full-price target group

records.title: `is_upgraded=true` proves backend authorization of a specific path or links a paid source entitlement
records.summary: It is persisted on the new mutable item group as attribution; the target still passes ordinary basket rules and there is no source invoice linkage

records.title: Repeated cart rendering offers another upgrade immediately on a group already marked upgraded
records.summary: Cart guard suppresses the offer when `is_upgraded`; the accepted target remains the only basket group

records.title: Basket update uses a stale `checkout_idempotency_key` after another accepted mutation rotated it
records.summary: Update returns the basket concurrency error; stale group/quantity state is not saved

records.title: Two basket updates acquire and modify the same row concurrently
records.summary: `select_for_update(nowait=True)` allows one; the lock loser receives a recoverable concurrency response

records.title: Client uses PATCH to partially mutate basket state
records.summary: Endpoint rejects the method; full PUT shape is required so dependencies and inventory are revalidated together

records.title: Missing checkout key is asserted to always reject today
records.summary: Not a valid invariant: it is logged but currently falls through to update for compatibility unless the ignore-idempotency switch bypasses the layer entirely

records.title: Ordinary requested item group persists with `quantity=0`, negative quantity, or missing quantity
records.summary: Model/frontend normalization rejects or removes it; zero operational semantics use separate derived fields/line types

records.title: Requested or display quantity exceeds 3000
records.summary: Field validation rejects before inventory reservation

records.title: Raw requested `quantity` is used as sold/refundable/settlement truth after transfer, refund, void, release, or other lifecycle mutation
records.summary: Operational logic uses `quantity_included_in_total`/issued item state; raw quantity remains historical/display context

records.title: Deleted item group is removed with a bare database delete that skips external inventory synchronization
records.summary: Shared deletion service deletes and then synchronizes captured external usages

records.title: Removing a package parent leaves hidden child charge, credential, fulfillment, seat, or product rows in the basket
records.summary: Dependency rebuild/deletion removes detached descendants and releases their owned state

records.title: Removing a configured package child while retaining its parent permanently deletes the required entitlement
records.summary: Backend rebuild re-adds configured children or returns `selection_required`; custom/preset selection must be resolved through its supported mutation

records.title: Removing one assigned seat deletes every seat group, or removing the final seat leaves a zero-seat ticket group
records.summary: Permission-aware removal retains unaffected seats and removes the group when no selected permission remains

records.title: Positive quantity delta skips product/member/gift/ticket/event/password/location limit validation because the type was already present in the basket
records.summary: Change map records the delta and affected resources are locked/checked against final operational counts

records.title: Quantity decrease fails only because ticket/member/product is now sold out
records.summary: Sold-out/inventory checks are skipped for non-positive deltas; releasing capacity remains allowed

evidence.label: Evidence
evidence.value: family limit cleaners and quantity-change guards

records.title: Distributed-inventory group quantity changes without taking/releasing matching `InventoryItem` ticket/event/location/permission rows
records.summary: Reservation adjust must match group quantity; verification/final assignment detects drift or fails the transaction

records.title: Dynamic-hold child decrease releases inventory to the public pool, or increase takes inventory outside its parent hold
records.summary: Reservations move between child and parent groups; insufficient parent allocation rejects

records.title: Two legacy baskets both reserve the final counter-based unit after reading availability without a lock
records.summary: Base inventory row is locked before active operational quantities are counted; one update rejects

records.title: Failed basket mutation leaves deleted rows, changed counters, new seat/location usages, or partial distributed reservations committed
records.summary: Atomic save and explicit counter rollback restore the prior committed state

records.title: Frontend keeps optimistic quantity after backend mutation rejection
records.summary: Quantity editor resets local state and error handling invalidates/refetches the authoritative basket

records.title: Empty basket reaches purchase finalization and creates an invoice
records.summary: Invoice-sale serializer rejects `len(item_groups)==0`

records.title: Purchase trusts the last client-rendered totals, terms, answers, preset variant, or provider amount after a basket mutation
records.summary: Backend reloads/validates current basket and rejects stale or incomplete state before issuance

records.title: Waitlist line with `quantity_included_in_total=0` is treated as an empty requested group and pruned before subscriber creation
records.summary: Requested `quantity` remains positive; only operational sale count is zero, so the waitlist lifecycle retains the group

records.title: Payment-plan zero-quantity ticket copy consumes a Stripe Level 3 line-item slot or adds another sold unit
records.summary: Level 3 construction skips non-positive quantity lines and the copy is not another ordinary admission reservation

evidence.label: Evidence
evidence.value: payment flow system doc/payment-plan group creation

records.title: Public buyer selects a named price tier as a checkout option or submits an arbitrary tier ID to change price
records.summary: Current public flow selects a sellable; backend resolves its tier transparently. Tier identity is not a buyer-controlled price choice

records.title: Organization subscription/pricing tier gates are treated as purchase price-tier behavior
records.summary: These are separate monetization permissions; `venue.price_tiers_enabled` and financial `PriceTier` own sellable price snapshots

records.title: PriceTier has no sellable target or points to two of ticket type, product attribute, and membership level
records.summary: Database check constraint rejects it

records.title: Tier for one sellable is reused solely because another sellable has the same price
records.summary: Retrieval keys by relation type and sellable ID as well as price; cross-item reuse is impossible

records.title: Unpublished historical tier is selected as the active tier
records.summary: Active retrieval filters to published visibility

records.title: Older matching tier wins when several published tiers exist for the same sellable and price
records.summary: Retrieval orders newest ID first; current cohort is deterministic

records.title: Changing an unlocked sellable's price edits the old tier's price in place
records.summary: Price change creates/resolves a distinct tier; existing tier identity is not rewritten to another price

records.title: Changing price or fee settings mutates a tier after a purchase locked it
records.summary: Locked tier remains unchanged and a new unlocked tier is created for current catalog state

records.title: Reverting a catalog price always reuses the old historical tier
records.summary: An eligible unlocked match can be reused/updated, but a locked historical match causes a new tier; blanket reuse is invalid

records.title: Tier-enabled basket always adopts the latest active tier during recalculation even after it captured a matching tier
records.summary: Matching retained tier wins, preserving the basket snapshot through a mid-purchase catalog edit

records.title: Renewal retains a tier whose `purchasable_item` differs from the newly selected level/type/attribute
records.summary: Stale-tier guard rejects the relation and resolves the current item's tier

records.title: Valid PWYC amount is ignored whenever a tier exists
records.summary: PWYC takes amount precedence while preserving a matching tier for reporting

records.title: Package child, transfer child, or payment-plan copy charges the active tier's full base price
records.summary: Package/transfer children return zero; payment-plan group returns installment price with no tier

records.title: Tier fee calculation always reads the venue's latest fee config after purchase
records.summary: Unlocked tier may read current venue config; locked tier returns its frozen fee-calculation configuration

records.title: Purchase locks a package child tier as an independent paid sellable cohort
records.summary: Groups with a parent are excluded from tier locking; derived children follow package/revenue rules and do not receive a duplicate independent price lock

records.title: Auto-generated membership child price is relocked during ordinary purchase
records.summary: Auto-generated payment-type groups are excluded so future exchange behavior retains its intended lock state

records.title: Invoice creation drops the basket tier and reports the item under whatever tier is active later
records.summary: Invoice item copies `price_tier_id`; later catalog edits do not relabel the sale

records.title: Refund, void, exchange, dispute, or revenue negation resolves a fresh current tier
records.summary: Derivative rows propagate the source invoice item's tier ID

records.title: Basket contains only TicketTypes whose patron types all require another patron type
records.summary: Basket update rejects with the cannot-purchase-alone message

records.title: A no-patron TicketType is assumed by the backend to satisfy a dependent patron TicketType
records.summary: Current backend filters the dependency check to patron-typed tickets, so the dependent-only patron subset still rejects; frontend selection logic can appear looser

records.title: Event TicketType with `membership_level_substitute` is expected to issue both a TicketItem and a Member, or backend-enforce equal ticket/member prices and rate cards
records.summary: Basket swaps to the MembershipLevel and issues membership outcome only; model warning explicitly leaves price/rate-card parity to configuration

evidence.label: Evidence
evidence.value: substitute field/help text and basket build path

records.title: Bulk transfer selects a package child directly or transfers only a subset of bundle descendants
records.summary: Serializer rejects child-only selection and stages descendants from the selected root

records.title: Inactive, hidden, sold-out, wrong-channel, or parent-scope-excluded Product is added from stale public data
records.summary: Product/add-on query and basket validation reject it; stale visibility cannot authorize purchase

records.title: Product modal submits no positive variant quantity or standalone selector persists an ordinary zero-quantity group
records.summary: Frontend blocks/prunes it and backend requires a valid positive group

records.title: Variant quantity exceeds finite inventory or purchase limit, including across several top-level groups
